 {"id":"bd-1rdc","title":"Tests for ACFS manifest parsing + registry-driven setup","description":"Goal:\n- Add unit tests for manifest parsing and registry-driven setup/detection with detailed, structured logging.\n\nScope:\n- Happy path parsing, missing fields, invalid schema.\n- Ensure detection uses registry list ordering.\n- Log tool id, manifest version/hash, and error category for every failure path.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Tests pass in bun test for gateway/services.\n- Logs are rich enough to diagnose failures without reproducing locally.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:42.563014375Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:08:18.798653510Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["registry","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1rdc","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:42.583324125Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1rdc","depends_on_id":"bd-20kj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:27.734570252Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1rdc","depends_on_id":"bd-23qe","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:28.753122362Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1spt","title":"Add CAAM client to flywheel-clients","description":"Goal:
- Add CAAM client wrapper (status, activate, backup).

Scope:
- JSON parsing where available; return structured errors otherwise.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-3gja + bd-9v6g.
- E2E: bd-mipc (stub harness).
- Schema drift: bd-20sm.
